tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Capo 9

[Intro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Hey-ay, Hey-ay-ay-ay-ay, Hey-ay-ay-ay-ay[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Your lipstick stains   on the front lobe of my left side brains[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I knew I wouldn't forget you and so I went and let you blow my mind[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Your sweet moonbeam the smell of you in every single dream I dream[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I knew when we collided you're the one I have decided who's one of my kind[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                 
Hey soul sister ain't that Mr. Mister on the radio stereo[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                 
The way you move ain't fair you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Hey soul sister I don't want to miss a single thing you do[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Tonight Hey-ay, Hey-ay-ay-ay-ay, Hey-ay-ay-ay-ay[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Just in time I'm so glad you have a one track mind like me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You gave my love direction a game show love connection we can't deny[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I'm so obsessed my heart is bound to beat right outta my untrimmed chest[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I believe in you like a virgin you're Ma-donna and I'm always gonna wanna blow your mind[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                 
Hey soul sister ain't that Mr. Mister on the radio stereo[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                 
The way you move ain't fair you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
Tonight.[/tab]
The way you can't cut a rug
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]Em7[/ch]
Watching you's the only drug I need[/tab]
         
You're so gangster I'm so thug
[tab]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
You're the only one I'm dreaming of you see[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]
I can be myself now finally[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Em7[/ch]
In fact there's nothing I can't be[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       
I want the world to see you be with   me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                 
Hey soul sister ain't that Mr. Mister on the radio stereo[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
